library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Petition in Arabic, twelfth-century Fatimid. The petition is addressed to a military general at the time of al-Mustaʿlī or al-Āmir. The petitioner is most likely also a former army personnel and is petitioning regarding an iqṭāʿ. A join for this fragment appears in the neighboring shelfmark ENA 3285.18v (Matthew Dudley). Both of these state fragments were reused for a literary text in Hebrew (perhaps piyyut according to FGP). Requires further examination.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
